top_signals.title: War in Iran Approaches 100 Day Mark
top_signals.summary: American forces headed off Iranian missile and drone attacks in the Persian Gulf as the war that began nearly 100 days ago continued to simmer with no resolution in the offing. Six ballistic missiles fired at Bahrain and Kuwait “were intercepted and a seventh did not reach its intended target,” US Central Command said in a statement on X late Friday. Bloomberg News Congressional Reporter Steven Dennis joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China poaches more AI talent from the U.S. as it eyes the next 'super-app'
top_signals.summary: Tencent Chief AI Scientist Yao Shunyu, who joined the company from OpenAI, said Friday he aims to pursue artificial general intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Frasers Weighs £500 Million Bid for Shopping Center, Sky Reports
top_signals.summary: Mike Ashley’s Frasers Group Plc is considering a £500 million ($667 million) bid for Metrocentre, one of the UK’s biggest shopping centers, Sky News reports.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
